methodology: Export all tenders where ≥2 of {OrangeBD, Tappware, SoftBD} bid, analyze patterns

bid_rotation.definition: Predictable winner rotation (Entity A wins in Month X, Entity B in Month Y)

complementary_bidding.definition: Consistent bid margins (e.g., winner always 5% lower than runner-up)
complementary_bidding.red_flag: High: indicates knowledge of competitors' bids

identical_boilerplate.definition: Technical proposals share identical text, formatting, or rare phrases

bidder_exclusion.definition: When all three bid, smaller competitors bid unusually high or withdraw
bidder_exclusion.red_flag: Medium: indicates coordination to favor certain players
